items.t: KAIST, 전기신호만으로 기능 바꾸는 ‘초소형 광학칩’ 세계최초 개발
items.d: 전기 신호만으로 기능을 바꿔 분광기와 카메라 등으로 활용할 수 있는 반도체 광학 칩을 국내 연구진이 개발했다.KAIST는 김현정 항공우주공학과 교수팀이 미국 매사추세츠공대(MIT) 연구팀과 함께 전기 신호에 따라 기능을 전환하는 초소형 광학 칩을 세계 최초로 개발했다고 14일 밝혔다. 그동안 위성이나 발사체에는 임무에 맞춰 광학 필터와 센서를 각각 새로 설계해 탑재해야 했다. 새 칩은 하드웨어를 교체하지 않고도 열영상 센서, 분광기, 적외선 카메라 등 여러 장치의 기능을 수행할 수 있다.  연구팀은 빛의 투과량을 조절하는 메타표면 기반 칩을 총 36개 픽셀(6X6)로 구현했다. 각 픽셀을 따로 제어해 필요한 부분의 빛만 조절하는 방식이다. 픽셀 수가 늘면 선택하지 않은 픽셀에도 전류가 흘러 함께 작동할 수

items.t: OpenAI’s Feud With xAI Carries On as Apple Secrets Fight Revs Up
items.d: OpenAI asked a judge to find that a lawsuit filed by xAI Corp. accusing the ChatGPT maker of trade secret theft “should never have been filed” and seeks to recoup more than $1 million in legal expenses from Elon Musk’s company.

items.t: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
items.d: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.
items.fullText: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has cleared SpaceX to fly Starship prototypes again, after the company identified the probable cause of the failure of the rocket system’s booster stage during a flight in May. SpaceX said over the weekend that the next flight of Starship could happen as soon as this Thursday, July 16. It would be the second-ever launch of the third version, or V3, of Starship. SpaceX also said that this Starship will carry the first third-generation Starlink satellites to space. Previously, Starship had only carried dummy versions of the larger, more powerful internet satellites. This is SpaceX’s second test flight of its Starship system, and its first as a public company, testing the market’s appetite for the company’s “fly, fail, fix” approach to rocket development that often ends in fireballs — or, as CEO Elon Musk calls the explosions: “rapid unscheduled disassembly.” SpaceX completed its IPO and publicly listed on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange on June 12, making it one of the 10 most valuable companies in the world and raising nearly $86 billion, a record. SpaceX’s first test launch of the V3 Starship on May 22 was largely successful. The company’s Super Heavy booster lifted the 407-foot rocket into space before the upper stage section separated and deployed 20 satellite simulators along with two modified Starlinks that recorded footage of the Starship exterior. The new third-generation booster was supposed to return to Earth and perform a simulated landing in the Gulf of Mexico. But its engines didn’t properly re-ignite, and it instead plummeted into the water below. The problem happened at that moment of booster separation, according to SpaceX and the FAA. SpaceX said in a post published over the weekend that “slight differences in engine startup on the ship” caused the Booster to turn 90 degrees in the wrong direction. items.takeaway: Starship 재비행 허가로 우주발사체 사업 기대감 상승
